title: Traditional German Cucumber Salad
description: A refreshing and simple salad with cucumber, mayonnaise, and a hint of Indian spices, a perfect side dish for any German meal.
instructions: Cut the cucumber into thin slices.
In a large bowl, whisk together the mayonnaise and curry powder.
Add the sliced cucumber to the bowl and toss to coat with the mayonnaise mixture.
Stir in the sour cream until well combined.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, give the salad a good stir and adjust the seasoning if needed.
Serve chilled from a large bowl.
